site.name: Cactus Surf & Skate House
site.description: Centrally located in Tamraght we welcome you in our beautiful house with a rooftop terrace overlooking Taghazout Bay. Experience surf and skate sessions, freshly cooked tajines, rooftop parties, sunset BBQ's, movie nights and unforgettable memories.
